title: WaterBridge Stock Is Up 55% Since IPO. One Fund Bought Up $12 Million More Last Quarter
author: Jonathan Ponciano
description: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management increased its stake in WaterBridge Infrastructure by 504,627 shares worth $12.02 million in Q1 2026. WaterBridge shares have surged 55% since their September IPO, now trading at $31.06. The water management company reported strong Q1 results with $201 million in revenue and 51% adjusted EBITDA margins, while raising full-year guidance. The investment reflects confidence in the infrastructure play supporting oil and gas producers across major U.S. shale basins.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong post-IPO performance with 55% stock appreciation, robust Q1 financial results (51% EBITDA margins), raised full-year guidance, and institutional investor confidence demonstrated by Horizon Kinetics' additional $12 million investment. The company shows strong demand and operational efficiency in a growing infrastructure niche.
